RoleTypeDefinition.name: ascit
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: Defines a collection of IT entitlements which can be associated with Business Roles to provide users with specific access rights. ASCIT Roles can be constrained to entitlements within a single application or expanded to include entitlements across applications.

RoleTypeDefinition.name: aamright
RoleTypeDefinition.Description: An alternative Business Role for assigning capabilities; and other Ascension specific scenarios.

ObjectAttribute.name: approvalType
ObjectAttribute.Description: Comma separated approvers for the role request

ObjectAttribute.name: additionalApprover
ObjectAttribute.Description: Additional approving identity/workgroup to be used when approval type contains Identity

ObjectAttribute.name: privilegedIdentity
ObjectAttribute.Description: True/False attribute whether to treat the identity level approval as privileged

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroup
ObjectAttribute.Description: The sys_id of assignment group in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: snowAssignmentGroupName
ObjectAttribute.Description: The assignment group name in ServiceNow that will handle the fulfillment of the request

ObjectAttribute.name: ministry
ObjectAttribute.Description: Ascension Ministry associated with the role.
